query:
-- The Mobile items 32830, 32831, 32833, 32834, 32835, 32837, 32840 are exact duplicates 
-- of original items 988, 989, 991, 992, 993, 995, 998 (same amounts, same service S1125)
DELETE FROM billing_items WHERE id IN (32830, 32831, 32833, 32834, 32835, 32837, 32840);

-- Recalculate S1125 revenue
UPDATE services s
SET monthlyRevenue = (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)
  FROM billing_items bi
  WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
)
WHERE s.externalId = 'S1125';

-- Verify S1125 revenue
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue FROM services WHERE externalId = 'S1125';

-- Check remaining high-id billing items for Middlemount Coal to see if any more duplicates exist
SELECT id, description, lineAmount, serviceExternalId FROM billing_items
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0161' AND id >= 32000
ORDER BY id;
